name: Rust
description: Rust dedicated server template using the Pterodactyl Rust runtime image, an explicit SteamCMD install, Debian/i386 dependency preparation, and native library validation for libRustNative.so.

install.script:
#!/bin/bash
set -Eeuo pipefail

install_debian_runtime_deps() {
  if ! command -v apt-get >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    return 0
  fi
  export DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive
  dpkg --add-architecture i386 >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
  for attempt in 1 2 3; do
    if apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
      ca-certificates \
      curl \
      file \
      lib32gcc-s1 \
      lib32stdc++6 \
      libsqlite3-0 \
      libnsl2 \
      libsdl2-2.0-0 \
      libsdl2-2.0-0:i386 \
      libcurl4-gnutls-dev:i386 \
      libncurses5 \
      libncursesw5 \
      libcommon-sense-perl \
      libjson-perl; then
      return 0
    fi
    sleep $((attempt * 5))
  done
  echo "Failed to install Rust/SteamCMD runtime dependencies in installer image" >&2
  exit 19
}

install_debian_runtime_deps

cd /mnt/server
export HOME=/mnt/server

appid="${SRCDS_APPID:-258550}"
steam_user="${STEAM_USER:-anonymous}"
steam_pass="${STEAM_PASS:-}"
steam_auth="${STEAM_AUTH:-}"
beta_id="${SRCDS_BETAID:-}"
beta_pass="${SRCDS_BETAPASS:-}"
install_flags="${INSTALL_FLAGS:-}"

mkdir -p /mnt/server/steamcmd /mnt/server/steamapps /mnt/server/server/adpanel /mnt/server/cfg /mnt/server/logs /mnt/server/.steam/sdk32 /mnt/server/.steam/sdk64

install_steamcmd() {
  local tmp
  tmp="$(mktemp -d)"
  trap 'rm -rf "$tmp"' RETURN
  curl --fail --location --show-error --retry 5 --retry-delay 3 --connect-timeout 20 \
    -o "$tmp/steamcmd_linux.tar.gz" \
    https://steamcdn-a.akamaihd.net/client/installer/steamcmd_linux.tar.gz
  tar -xzf "$tmp/steamcmd_linux.tar.gz" -C /mnt/server/steamcmd
}

if [ ! -x /mnt/server/steamcmd/steamcmd.sh ]; then
  install_steamcmd
fi

steamcmd=(/mnt/server/steamcmd/steamcmd.sh +force_install_dir /mnt/server +login "$steam_user")
if [ -n "$steam_pass" ]; then
  steamcmd+=("$steam_pass")
fi
if [ -n "$steam_auth" ]; then
  steamcmd+=("$steam_auth")
fi
if [ "${WINDOWS_INSTALL:-0}" = "1" ]; then
  steamcmd+=(+@sSteamCmdForcePlatformType windows)
fi
steamcmd+=(+app_update "$appid")
if [ -n "$beta_id" ]; then
  steamcmd+=(-beta "$beta_id")
fi
if [ -n "$beta_pass" ]; then
  steamcmd+=(-betapassword "$beta_pass")
fi
if [ -n "$install_flags" ]; then
  # shellcheck disable=SC2206
  extra_flags=($install_flags)
  steamcmd+=("${extra_flags[@]}")
fi
steamcmd+=(validate +quit)

run_steamcmd_install() {
  for attempt in 1 2 3 4; do
    echo "Installing Rust Dedicated Server app $appid with SteamCMD (attempt $attempt/4)"
    if "${steamcmd[@]}"; then
      return 0
    fi
    if [ "$attempt" = "4" ]; then
      echo "Rust SteamCMD install failed after 4 attempts" >&2
      return 1
    fi
    sleep $((attempt * 10))
    install_steamcmd
    chmod +x /mnt/server/steamcmd/steamcmd.sh || true
  done
}

run_steamcmd_install || exit 21

normalize_rust_data_dir() {
  local base="${1:-/mnt/server}"
  local found_data_dir=""
  local candidate
  for candidate in "$base/RustDedicated_Data" "$base/rustdedicated_data"; do
    if [ -d "$candidate" ]; then
      found_data_dir="$candidate"
      break
    fi
  done
  if [ -z "$found_data_dir" ]; then
    found_data_dir="$(find /mnt/server -type d -iname 'RustDedicated_Data' 2>/dev/null | sort | head -n 1 || true)"
  fi
  if [ -n "$found_data_dir" ] && [ "$found_data_dir" != /mnt/server/RustDedicated_Data ]; then
    echo "Found RustDedicated_Data at $found_data_dir; normalizing it to /mnt/server/RustDedicated_Data"
    mkdir -p /mnt/server/RustDedicated_Data
    cp -a "$found_data_dir/." /mnt/server/RustDedicated_Data/
  fi
}

if [ ! -x /mnt/server/RustDedicated ]; then
  found_exe="$(find /mnt/server -type f -name RustDedicated -perm /111 2>/dev/null | sort | head -n 1 || true)"
  if [ -n "$found_exe" ] && [ "$found_exe" != /mnt/server/RustDedicated ]; then
    found_exe_dir="$(dirname "$found_exe")"
    echo "Found RustDedicated at $found_exe; normalizing it to /mnt/server/RustDedicated"
    cp -f "$found_exe" /mnt/server/RustDedicated
    chmod 755 /mnt/server/RustDedicated
    normalize_rust_data_dir "$found_exe_dir"
  fi
fi

normalize_rust_data_dir /mnt/server

if [ ! -x /mnt/server/RustDedicated ]; then
  echo "RustDedicated executable is missing after SteamCMD install" >&2
  find /mnt/server -maxdepth 4 -type f -name 'RustDedicated*' -print 2>/dev/null | sort >&2 || true
  exit 22
fi

native_dir=/mnt/server/RustDedicated_Data/Plugins/x86_64
native_lib="$native_dir/libRustNative.so"
mono_native_dir=/mnt/server/RustDedicated_Data/MonoBleedingEdge/x86_64
mkdir -p "$native_dir"

find_rust_native() {
  find /mnt/server -type f \
    \( -iname 'libRustNative.so' -o -iname 'RustNative.so' -o -iname 'RustNative' -o -iname '*RustNative*.so' \) \
    2>/dev/null | sort | head -n 1 || true
}

normalize_rust_native() {
  local found
  if [ -f "$native_lib" ]; then
    return 0
  fi
  found="$(find_rust_native)"
  if [ -z "$found" ]; then
    return 1
  fi
  echo "Found RustNative native library at $found; normalizing to $native_lib"
  if [ "$found" != "$native_lib" ]; then
    cp -f "$found" "$native_lib"
  fi
}

if ! normalize_rust_native; then
  echo "libRustNative.so was not found after the first SteamCMD validate; running one extra validate before failing." >&2
  run_steamcmd_install || true
fi

if ! normalize_rust_native; then
  echo "libRustNative.so is missing after SteamCMD validate." >&2
  echo "Searched for libRustNative.so, RustNative.so, RustNative and *RustNative*.so under /mnt/server." >&2
  echo "This usually means SteamCMD produced an unexpected depot layout or the depot did not include the Linux native plugin." >&2
  echo "RustNative candidates and plugin directories:" >&2
  find /mnt/server -maxdepth 7 \( -iname '*RustNative*' -o -path '*'/Plugins'*' -o -name 'RustDedicated_Data' \) -print 2>/dev/null | sort | head -n 250 >&2 || true
  echo "Top-level installed directories:" >&2
  find /mnt/server -maxdepth 3 -type d -print 2>/dev/null | sort | head -n 250 >&2 || true
  exit 23
fi

ln -sfn "libRustNative.so" "$native_dir/libRustNative"
ln -sfn "libRustNative.so" "$native_dir/RustNative"
ln -sfn "libRustNative.so" "$native_dir/RustNative.so"

if [ -d "$mono_native_dir" ]; then
  ln -sfn "../../Plugins/x86_64/libRustNative.so" "$mono_native_dir/libRustNative.so"
  ln -sfn "libRustNative.so" "$mono_native_dir/libRustNative"
  ln -sfn "libRustNative.so" "$mono_native_dir/RustNative"
  ln -sfn "libRustNative.so" "$mono_native_dir/RustNative.so"
fi

chmod 755 /mnt/server/RustDedicated
chmod -R 755 "$native_dir"

if command -v ldd >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  missing_libs="$(ldd "$native_lib" 2>/dev/null | awk '/not found/ {print $1}' | sort -u | xargs echo -n)"
  if [ -n "$missing_libs" ]; then
    echo "libRustNative.so has missing runtime dependencies: $missing_libs" >&2
    exit 24
  fi
fi

if [ -f /mnt/server/steamcmd/linux32/steamclient.so ]; then
  cp -f /mnt/server/steamcmd/linux32/steamclient.so /mnt/server/.steam/sdk32/steamclient.so
fi
if [ -f /mnt/server/steamcmd/linux64/steamclient.so ]; then
  cp -f /mnt/server/steamcmd/linux64/steamclient.so /mnt/server/.steam/sdk64/steamclient.so
fi

chown -R 1000:1000 /mnt/server 2>/dev/null || true
chmod -R u+rwX,go+rX /mnt/server
chmod -R 755 "$native_dir"

echo "Rust Dedicated Server installed and native libraries validated."
